research_question: Under the frozen v18 operational contract and whitelist-only source policy, which six Alpha158-style or literature-standardized atomic price-volume signals are most likely to pass composability hard-gate promotion?

source_policy.notes: Discovery intake is restricted to whitelist-approved literature/classic-definition sources.

discovery_contract.builder_rule: each candidate builder may rank exactly one raw signal field and may not combine multiple raw signals inside the same candidate
discovery_contract.source_inspiration_rule: This round is whitelist-only. Every candidate must map to an Alpha158-style atomic mechanism, a classic factor handbook definition, or a published academic paper mechanism, and must be implemented independently on this project's own data contracts.

signal_pool.interpretation: lower Amihud-style illiquidity indicates lower expected price impact per unit traded amount and potentially cleaner executable cross-sectional edge

source_provenance.source_title: Illiquidity and Stock Returns: Cross-Section and Time-Series Effects
source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: map return-to-amount price-impact intuition into a 20-day cross-sectional atomic illiquidity score
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented with this project bars_daily_derived contracts only; no dependency on neighboring qlib adapters

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This encodes impact-per-flow efficiency rather than pure traded-amount level ranking.

signal_pool.interpretation: lower turnover concentration implies more distributed participation across days and potentially more stable tradability quality

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: convert rolling turnover distribution concentration into a single 20-day atomic participation-stability signal
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented independently in this project with native turnover fields; no external adapter dependency

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: Uses concentration structure (HHI-like) rather than simple dispersion level (stddev) over turnover.

signal_pool.interpretation: persistent close-above-vwap tendency may capture session-end demand quality beyond simple close-location within daily range

source_provenance.source_title: Active Portfolio Management execution-quality inspired price-volume signalization
source_provenance.source_locator: Grinold and Kahn style execution-quality discussions
source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: translate close-vs-vwap bias into a standardized rolling atomic quality signal
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented with project-native OHLCV-derived proxies only; no qlib adapter usage

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: Anchors to volume-weighted price benchmark, not intraday high-low close placement.

signal_pool.interpretation: lower downside-skewed intraday range behavior may indicate healthier session microstructure and reduced downside dominance

source_provenance.source_title: Measuring Volatility with the Realized Range (asymmetry-oriented range intuition)
source_provenance.source_locator: Journal of Econometrics (2007) range-based volatility literature
source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: use asymmetric intraday range decomposition to derive a downside-vs-upside range skew atomic signal
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented solely on this project price bars with rolling windows and no external adapters

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: Captures asymmetry/skew of range states rather than share of range contributed by up sessions.

signal_pool.interpretation: stronger post-gap reversal intensity may encode short-horizon mean-repair dynamics beyond simple gap-fill frequency

source_provenance.source_title: Return Differences Between Trading and Non-trading Hours (overnight/gap behavior literature)
source_provenance.source_locator: Journal of Economics and Finance (overnight return decomposition literature)
source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: map overnight gap behavior into a rolling intensity-of-repair signal rather than binary gap counts
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented with project-native overnight/open-close path fields; no neighboring adapter stack involved

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: Focuses on magnitude/intensity of repair conditional on gaps, not fill frequency ratio alone.

signal_pool.interpretation: more persistent signed dollar-flow alignment may capture sustained participation pressure beyond one-window imbalance levels

source_provenance.source_title: Empirical Market Microstructure order-flow persistence intuition
source_provenance.source_locator: Market microstructure handbook/textbook treatment of signed flow persistence
source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: translate signed flow serial dependence into a rolling 20-day persistence atomic signal
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented independently from native amount/return series in this project; no external adapter linkage

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: Tests temporal persistence of signed flow rather than static net signed-flow ratio level.

discovery_contract.aggregation_rule: none; this round explicitly forbids combining signals
discovery_contract.missing_data_rule: score nulls are allowed and must be preserved for audit; no imputation or cross-signal fallback is allowed

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, same TopK=10 width, and same v18 top-15 refresh hysteresis
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same v18 refreshed-portfolio implementation until any later family round explicitly changes it

promotion_rule.phase_gate: Only atomic signals that show directionally coherent positive edge in signal-edge diagnostics may advance into a later composability-screening or family-construction round.
promotion_rule.non_promotion_rule: A signal that shows negative or near-zero broad ordering, inverted decile structure, or clearly weaker head labels than both rank11_20 and tail labels should be rejected rather than rescued by later extraction or overlay tweaks.

disallowed_changes: Do not mix multiple raw signals into one candidate inside this round.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change the frozen v18 refresh hysteresis rule.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not add extraction, weight-penalty, turnover-suppression, stability-cap, overlay, or family-composition changes inside this round.
notes: This template is for future single-signal discovery rounds only.
Every signal_pool entry must include a dedup_note before preregistration may be considered valid.
This round is whitelist-only and every candidate must pass source_provenance intake checks.
